title: Graph routing route-diff gallery
description: Static landing page for three Bellman-Ford route-diff stories: same-cost path churn, a candidate negative-cycle incident, and a link-failure reachability regression.

scenarios.title: Same-cost reroute after edge-weight shift
scenarios.description: Small weight changes flip B to a direct route and reroute D at the same final cost, showing why distance deltas alone can hide path churn.

artifacts.label: Markdown report
artifacts.description: Text diff with changed edges and per-node route explanations.

artifacts.label: HTML dashboard
artifacts.description: Static dashboard with summary cards and audit tables.

artifacts.label: SVG summary card
artifacts.description: Compact visual card for README thumbnails or slides.

scenarios.title: Candidate negative-cycle incident
scenarios.description: The candidate graph introduces a reachable negative cycle, turning every formerly stable route into an unstable routing incident that must be surfaced immediately.

artifacts.label: Markdown report
artifacts.description: Route-diff report that highlights the reachable cycle and unstable route table.

artifacts.label: HTML dashboard
artifacts.description: Static incident dashboard for the negative-cycle regression.

artifacts.label: SVG summary card
artifacts.description: Compact cycle-incident card for quick portfolio previews.

scenarios.title: Link-failure reachability regression
scenarios.description: A broken path to D and higher route costs for B/C show how topology drift can mix cost regressions with a hard reachability failure.

artifacts.label: Markdown report
artifacts.description: Diff artifact for the partial outage / unreachable-destination scenario.

artifacts.label: HTML dashboard
artifacts.description: Static dashboard covering the link-failure regression.

artifacts.label: SVG summary card
artifacts.description: Compact outage card showing the reachability regression.
